title: Visible Powdered Snow
description: Adds an outline to powdered snow making it easier to see.
body:
This pack adds a clear outline to powdered snow, making it much easier to spot while exploring or building. No more accidentally falling into hidden patches. The border helps powdered snow stand out from regular snow without changing much.

**Subscribe to my YouTube:** https://www.youtube.com/@OasisSucksAtMc?sub_confirmation=1
